rationale: Parent digest mismatch (shared T3): the edge names a digest the attached predecessor does NOT have, so the required relation cannot resolve — the policy turns that into a hard FAIL (exit 3, LINEAGE_REQUIREMENT_FAILED). The mismatch manifests as failure-to-resolve because attached targets are keyed by their COMPUTED content root (a lying edge never finds a target).
testKeys: fresh throwaway keys, generated by conformance/relation/generate_vectors.py
